_meta.doc: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for Strategy-Lab parameters. Edit here, never hardcode in strategy code. Risk LIMITS are NOT here — they come from spa_core.risk.policy (RiskConfig). Loaded via spa_core.strategy_lab.config.load_config().

promotion._doc: Thresholds for promotion.py — the deterministic decision layer that scores each lab sleeve and assigns a pipeline STAGE (REJECT / BACKTEST_PASS / PAPER_CANDIDATE) along RESEARCH→BACKTEST→WALK-FORWARD→PAPER→CANARY→FULL. Fail-CLOSED: any missing criterion fails. NEVER hardcode these in code. RiskPolicy is the gate; LLM FORBIDDEN.

variant_n.name: Neutral Restaking (delta-neutral LRT + perp short)
variant_n.depeg_doc: Depeg kill is measured on a depeg_median_window-tick trailing MEDIAN of the LRT/ETH ratio and must persist depeg_persist_ticks consecutive ticks before killing. This rejects 1-day DeFiLlama daily-granularity timestamp-misalignment artifacts (lone ratio spikes up/down) while still catching a REAL sustained depeg. See docs/GLOBAL_AUDIT + memory historical-apy-axis-misaligned.

eth_lst_neutral.name: ETH LST Neutral (delta-neutral stETH/rETH + perp short)
eth_lst_neutral.doc: The SAFE ETH-yield sleeve: PLAIN-STAKING LST (stETH/rETH, NOT LRTs) hedged with a short ETH perp → beta ≈ 0. Income = staking yield ± funding. LSTs barely depeg vs the LRTs that died in 2024, so the depeg kill (lst_depeg_kill_pct) is TIGHTER than variant_n's. T2, advisory until canary.
eth_lst_neutral.depeg_doc: TIGHT 1% LST depeg kill is measured on a depeg_median_window-tick trailing MEDIAN of the LST/ETH ratio and must persist depeg_persist_ticks consecutive ticks before killing. Without this, Aug-2024 DeFiLlama timestamp-misalignment artifacts (stETH spurious 0.95/1.14 ratio while the peg held ~1.0) FALSE-kill this safe sleeve. See docs/GLOBAL_AUDIT + memory historical-apy-axis-misaligned.

eth_lst_staking.name: ETH LST Staking (directional long stETH/rETH + staking yield)
eth_lst_staking.doc: Directional ETH staking: HOLD a plain-staking LST (stETH/rETH, NOT an LRT) and earn the staking APY (~2.5%) on top of full ETH price exposure (beta ≈ 1). The directional counterpart to the delta-neutral eth_lst_neutral. Isolated, paper-only, OUTSIDE the go-live track. Kill: drawdown stop. T2, advisory.

btc_neutral.name: BTC Neutral (market-neutral BTC funding carry: tBTC/cbBTC + BTC perp short)
btc_neutral.doc: Market-neutral BTC funding carry: long a SAFE wrapped-BTC spot (tBTC/cbBTC) + short BTC perp → beta ≈ 0 to BTC. Income = BTC perp funding (primary) + a small honest wrapped-BTC lending floor (~0-1.2%; BTC is rarely borrowed on-chain). Kills (fail-closed, reusing the eth_lst_neutral depeg-median-smoothing): negative funding below threshold for N hours; wrapper/BTC depeg beyond Y% on a SMOOTHED, PERSISTENT signal (rejects 1-day DeFiLlama artifacts). We hold only the SAFE wrappers and AVOID WBTC (wrapper risk). T2, advisory.
btc_neutral.depeg_doc: Wrapper-depeg kill is measured on a depeg_median_window-tick trailing MEDIAN of the wrapper/BTC ratio and must persist depeg_persist_ticks consecutive ticks before killing — rejecting 1-day DeFiLlama daily-granularity timestamp-misalignment artifacts while still catching a REAL sustained wrapper depeg. Same root + remedy as eth_lst_neutral / variant_n.

btc_lending_sleeve.name: BTC Lending Sleeve (hold tBTC/cbBTC + earn the lending floor)
btc_lending_sleeve.doc: Directional BTC + lending floor: HOLD a SAFE wrapped-BTC token (tBTC/cbBTC) and earn the wrapped-BTC lending APY (~0-1.2%, honest — BTC is rarely borrowed on-chain) on top of full BTC price exposure (beta ≈ 1 to BTC). Honest framing: this is 'hold BTC + earn the floor', low yield. Isolated, paper-only, OUTSIDE the go-live track. Kill: drawdown stop. We hold only the SAFE wrappers and AVOID WBTC. T2, advisory.

rwa_sleeve.name: RWA Sleeve — tokenized T-bill cash floor (T1)
rwa_sleeve.doc: Allocatable T1 cash-floor sleeve: HOLDS tokenized US Treasuries (BUIDL/USYC/USDY/OUSG) and accrues at the LIVE rwa_feed floor rate. Distinct from the rwa_floor benchmark row — this is the realized floor a portfolio can park cash in. apy_pct is only an offline last-resort; the live floor (rwa_floor_apy_pct) is the primary rate.
